title: astragalus qoturensis
intro: Astragalus qoturensis, also known as the Qatuer Astragalus, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the legume family. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus qoturensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus qoturensis can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
